---
title: "Notes to myself"
title-block-banner: "images/topics.png"
page-layout: full
link-external-newwindow: true
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default # grid
  categories: cloud
  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: true
  date-format: "MMMM, YYYY"
  feed: true # für RSS feed

---
